DeleteEniIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
DeleteEniIp.privateIpAddress: The private IP address to be deleted, either IPv4 or IPv6 address can be specified
DeleteEniIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
